context: Evaluates whether the agent adds proper metadata annotations: package annotation, rule annotations with entrypoint, and annotations placed immediately above the rule with no blank lines.

checklist.name: Package-level metadata annotation
checklist.description: The module has a `# METADATA` block before the `package` declaration with at least `title` and `description` fields

checklist.name: `allow` rule annotated with `entrypoint: true`
checklist.description: The `allow` rule (or `default allow`) has a `# METADATA` block with `entrypoint: true` to mark it as the policy entrypoint

checklist.name: No blank lines between metadata and rule
checklist.description: Each `# METADATA` block is immediately followed by the rule it annotates — no blank lines between the metadata comment and the rule declaration

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
